summary: Open Settings to configure the app, permissions and language.
detail: Settings groups app-wide options: permissions the app needs, the interface language, and analytics consent. Nothing here starts or stops the server.

summary: Show a QR code so a nearby device can join and open your library.
detail: The QR encodes the Wi-Fi network (or hotspot) plus the address of your library. Guests scan it to connect and browse — no typing required.

summary: Share your library over the current Wi-Fi network.
detail: When your phone is on Wi-Fi, other devices on the same network can reach your library at your phone's address.

summary: Turn on a hotspot so nearby devices can connect with no external network.
detail: The hotspot creates a local Wi-Fi network from your phone. It works even with no SIM or internet, which is ideal for offline sharing.
The server must be running for other devices to reach your library. Starting it may take a few seconds the first time.
